About The Camp

Six days that will change your life

AIC Jericho Youth Ministry invites all youth to an unforgettable summer camp experience in the beautiful coastal city of Mombasa. From powerful Bible discussions to team challenges and beach adventures — this camp is designed to strengthen your faith, build lasting friendships, and create memories you'll carry for life.

Hosted at Mombasa Baptist High School, August 16–21, 2026. All are welcome — come as you are, leave transformed.

6
Action-packed days
5

What We've Got Planned

Five epic activities

📖
Bible Discussions
Deep, life-changing conversations rooted in scripture.
🤝
Team Building
Fun challenges to forge trust and lasting bonds.
🏊
Swimming
Dive into the Indian Ocean — refreshing and unforgettable.
🎮
Games
Something for every kind of player at camp.
🌿
Nature Trail
Explore Mombasa's stunning scenery on guided trails.

More from Camp 2025

The fun was real

View full Camp 2025 album →

Camp Programme

Six days, packed with purpose

Day 1 — Aug 16
Arrival & Welcome
Check in, orientation, opening worship & prayer, evening bonfire.
Day 2 — Aug 17
Team Building Day
Morning devotionals, team challenges, games tournament.
Day 3 — Aug 18
Ocean & Beach Day
Swimming, beach games, sunset worship on the shore.
Day 4 — Aug 19
Bible Deep Dive
Intensive discussions, breakout groups, testimonies, ministry time.
Day 5 — Aug 20
Nature Trail Adventure
Guided nature trail, reflection time, evening talent showcase.
Day 6 — Aug 21
Closing Celebration
Final worship service, commissioning prayer, certificate ceremony, farewell.

The Location

Mombasa Baptist High School

Set in the heart of Mombasa County — the Indian Ocean is minutes away.
📍 Get directions

Spacious accommodation for all campers
Dining hall with full catering
Sports fields & outdoor spaces
Close proximity to the beach
Accessible from Nairobi by SGR or bus

About The Camp

Six days that will change your life

AIC Jericho Youth Ministry invites all youth to an unforgettable summer camp experience in the beautiful coastal city of Mombasa. From powerful Bible discussions to team challenges and beach adventures — this camp is designed to strengthen your faith, build lasting friendships, and create memories you'll carry for life.

Hosted at Mombasa Baptist High School, the camp runs from August 16th to 21st, 2026. All are welcome — come as you are, leave transformed.

What We've Got Planned

📖
Bible Discussions
Deep, life-changing conversations rooted in scripture. Grow in faith together.
🤝
Team Building
Fun challenges designed to forge trust, communication and lasting bonds.
🏊

Dive into the Indian Ocean — refreshing, thrilling and unforgettable coastal fun.

Camp Programme

Six days, packed with purpose

Day 1 — Aug 16
Arrival & Welcome
Check in, settle in, orientation, opening worship & prayer, evening bonfire.
Day 2 — Aug 17
Team Building Day
Morning devotionals, team challenges, trust exercises, afternoon games tournament.
Day 3 — Aug 18
Ocean & Beach Day
Swimming, beach games, sunset worship on the shore.
Day 4 — Aug 19
Bible Deep Dive
Intensive Bible discussions, breakout groups, testimonies, ministry time.
Day 5 — Aug 20
Nature Trail Adventure
Guided nature trail, reflection time, evening talent showcase.
Day 6 — Aug 21
Closing Celebration
Final worship service, commissioning prayer, certificate ceremony, farewell.

The Location

Mombasa Baptist High School

Set in the heart of Mombasa County, our venue offers the perfect blend of spiritual retreat and coastal adventure. The Indian Ocean is just minutes away.
